_meta.label: Votion
_meta.summary: Vote-optimization tool for TLA (and Hydro). Helps voters direct voting power to maximize bribe returns, and is a data source for vote/bribe intelligence.

facts.claim: Votion is a vote-optimization tool for TLA and Hydro: it helps holders allocate voting power across pools to maximize returns from bribes.
facts.notes: Role known from existing TLA docs content; canonical Votion doc section to confirm.

facts.claim: Votion's bribe/vote data is relevant to TLA Vote Intelligence — including bribe-source attribution and VP-swing-by-briber as a centralization-health signal.
